title: The Last Gentleman
writer: Leonard Praskins, Katharine Clugston, Maude T. Howell
actors: George Arliss, Edna May Oliver, Janet Beecher
plot: In New England circa 1933, a niece is reported missing and presumed dead and Cabot Barr (George Arliss) summons his relatives to the family estate for a memorial service. Once there, Barr taunts each one, claiming their only inter...
